$comment: Single source of truth for the OAuth console registrations that MUST exist for Better Auth sign-in to work. Console redirect_uri handed to Google/Apple is `https://<appHost>/api/auth/callback/<provider>` (plan decision 3, Phase 5). Better Auth owns the callback handler at `apps/web/app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts`; the Google OAuth client + Apple Service ID consoles are registered against this app host directly (no Clerk FAPI proxy in the path). If an app host below changes, the Google/Apple consoles MUST be re-synced via /auth-console-sync BEFORE shipping, or production sign-in breaks with redirect_uri_mismatch (the 2026-06-26 incident class). Consumed by scripts/auth-redirect-uris.ts, apps/web/tests/unit/auth/redirect-uri-snapshot.test.ts, apps/web/tests/e2e/oauth-providers.spec.ts, and .claude/skills/auth-console-sync.

native.$comment: Better Auth's `oneTap` plugin surfaces Google One Tap in the browser. iOS native auth completes back into the app via this deep-link scheme (provider-agnostic PKCE handoff, Clerk → BA unchanged transport). The Apple App ID `ie.jov.Jovie` carries the Sign in with Apple capability; not a console redirect_uri.
